text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... So tired... That photoshootwent way too late last night...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No—get a hold of yourself, Gold City.<n>You can
handle both racing and<n>modeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's what I told my manager, anyway...<n>I can do
this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...That's it. Tonight I'm going straight to<n>bed after
a nice, warm bath.
